# Free Stuff @ Dartmouth

> A verified, ad-free catalog of perks that are genuinely free for Dartmouth students and alumni — software, transit, gear, museums, grants, and more. Only things you can get WITHOUT paying money are listed (no discounts, no affiliate links, no ads). Every entry shows a last-verified date.

## Browse
- [Full catalog](https://dartmouth.campusfreebies.com): all verified free perks, searchable by category
- [Campus map](https://dartmouth.campusfreebies.com/map): perks by location around Hanover
- [Scenario guides](https://dartmouth.campusfreebies.com/scenarios): curated sets (new to campus, job hunting, creative work, and more)

## What "free" means here
A listing qualifies only if a student gets the benefit without paying money. Conditions like showing a student ID or reserving ahead are fine. Memberships, fees, and discounts (still paid) do not qualify and are excluded.

## About
Part of [Free Stuff on Campus](https://campusfreebies.com) — an independent, student-built, open-source project. Not affiliated with Dartmouth College. Always confirm details on the official pages each listing links to.
